script:
#!/bin/bash
export PATH=/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:$PATH
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'FINAL FIXES + VALIDATION'
echo '========================================'

# --- Fix 1: Check UFW with full path ---
echo '--- UFW Status ---'
ufw status verbose

# --- Fix 2: Fix vk-callback server.js hardcoded 0.0.0.0 ---
echo ''
echo '--- Fixing vk-callback server.js ---'
if [ -f /opt/vk-callback/server.js ]; then
  grep -n "listen.*0.0.0.0" /opt/vk-callback/server.js
  sed -i "s/listen(CONFIG.port, '0.0.0.0'/listen(CONFIG.port, '127.0.0.1'/g" /opt/vk-callback/server.js
  grep -n "listen" /opt/vk-callback/server.js | head -5
  systemctl restart vk-callback
  sleep 2
  echo 'vk-callback binding after fix:'
  ss -tlnp | grep ':3102 '
fi

# --- Fix 3: Also fix WP compose if it exists somewhere ---
echo ''
echo '--- Looking for WP compose ---'
# Docker labels showed /opt/claude-chat/mebelit-wp/docker-compose.yml but dir was missing
# Let's search more broadly
find / -maxdepth 6 -path '*/mebelit*' -name '*.yml' 2>/dev/null
find / -maxdepth 6 -name 'docker-compose.yml' -exec grep -l 'wordpress\|mebelit' {} \; 2>/dev/null

# --- Final Scorecard ---
echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo '         FINAL SECURITY SCORECARD'
echo '========================================'

SCORE=0
MAX=10

# 1. UFW active?
ufw status 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Status: active' && { echo '[+] UFW: ACTIVE (+2)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+2)); } || echo '[-] UFW: INACTIVE'

# 2. SSH hardened?
grep -q 'PermitRootLogin prohibit-password' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && { echo '[+] SSH: Root login by key only (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] SSH: Root password login allowed'
grep -q 'PasswordAuthentication no' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && { echo '[+] SSH: Password auth disabled (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] SSH: Password auth enabled'

# 3. Fail2ban?
systemctl is-active fail2ban >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo '[+] Fail2ban: RUNNING (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] Fail2ban: NOT RUNNING'
BANNED=$(fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null | grep 'Currently banned' | awk '{print $NF}')
echo "    Banned IPs: $BANNED"

# 4. MySQL blocked via iptables?
iptables -L DOCKER-USER -n 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dpt:3306.*DROP' && { echo '[+] MySQL 3306: BLOCKED via iptables DOCKER-USER (+2)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+2)); } || echo '[-] MySQL 3306: EXPOSED'

# 5. WP direct blocked?
iptables -L DOCKER-USER -n 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dpt:8080.*DROP' && { echo '[+] WordPress 8080: BLOCKED via iptables DOCKER-USER (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] WordPress 8080: EXPOSED'

# 6. Control-bridge on localhost?
ss -tlnp | grep ':3000 ' | grep -q '127.0.0.1' && { echo '[+] Control-bridge 3000: localhost only (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] Control-bridge: EXPOSED'

# 7. Upload server stopped?
ss -tlnp | grep -q ':9090 ' && echo '[-] Upload server 9090: STILL RUNNING' || { echo '[+] Upload server 9090: STOPPED (+1)'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); }

echo ''
echo "SECURITY SCORE: $SCORE / $MAX"
if [ $SCORE -ge 8 ]; then
  echo 'RATING: GOOD (was 4/10, now 8+/10)'
elif [ $SCORE -ge 6 ]; then
  echo 'RATING: ACCEPTABLE (was 4/10, now 6-7/10)'
else
  echo 'RATING: NEEDS MORE WORK'
fi

echo ''
echo '--- Remaining open ports on 0.0.0.0 ---'
ss -tlnp | grep '0.0.0.0' | grep -v '127.0.0' | awk '{print $4}' | sort

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'HARDENING COMPLETE'
echo '========================================'
intent: Final fixes: vk-callback localhost, UFW check, scorecard
